title: Help find missing Mossel Bay woman
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Da Gamaskop Police in Mossel Bay are asking for assistance in helping to find the 35-year-old Selwoline Wabani, also known as ‘Meisie’.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Da Gamaskop Police in Mossel Bay are asking for assistance in helping to find the 35-year-old Selwoline Wabani, also known as ‘Meisie’."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Wabani is considered to be vulnerable and was last seen at the D’Almeida Clinic near the Da Gamaskop Police Station at 08:00 on Monday 27 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She was discovered to be missing when she was due to have her lunch.","html":"She was discovered to be missing when she was due to have her lunch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She was wearing a long black and brown dress and white Nike sneakers. She has brown eyes, black hair, thick lips, small and flat ears and a broad nose. She has a slender build and weighs about 40kg.","html":"She was wearing a long black and brown dress and white Nike sneakers. She has brown eyes, black hair, thick lips, small and flat ears and a broad nose. She has a slender build and weighs about 40kg."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If anyone has seen her or has any information regarding her whereabouts, contact Warrant Officer Marianne du Plessis at the Da Gamaskop Police Station on 044 606 2257/082 469 7583 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111.","html":"If anyone has seen her or has any information regarding her whereabouts, contact Warrant Officer Marianne du Plessis at the Da Gamaskop Police Station on 044 606 2257/082 469 7583 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Help find missing Mossel Bay woman
